claimText: The Integrated Air Defence Weapon System (IADWS) includes QRSAM for protecting moving armoured columns and VSHORADS, a MANPADS for low-altitude threats.
evidenceExcerpt: IADWS components include QRSAM (protects moving armoured columns) and VSHORADS (MANPADS for low-altitude threats).
examUse: Statement-based question on the specific roles of IADWS components.
distractorHooks: Swapping the roles of QRSAM and VSHORADS
Claiming VSHORADS is for high-altitude threats

claimText: Project Kusha (PGLRSAM) is a DRDO initiative aimed at developing a long-range air defence missile system with an interception range exceeding 600 km in Phase 2.
evidenceExcerpt: Project Kusha (PGLRSAM) is a DRDO initiative to develop a long-range air defence missile system with interceptors exceeding 600 km range in Phase 2.
examUse: Correct-pair question matching defence projects with their objectives or ranges.
distractorHooks: Attributing Project Kusha to a foreign collaboration like Israel or Russia
Stating it is a short-range missile system

claimText: Anant Shastra is an indigenous Quick Reaction Surface-to-Air Missile (QRSAM) system developed by DRDO, BEL, and BDL with a range of around 30 km.
evidenceExcerpt: Anant Shastra is an indigenous QRSAM system developed by DRDO, BEL, and BDL with a range of around 30 km.
examUse: Statement-based question on indigenous missile systems and their specifications.
distractorHooks: Describing Anant Shastra as an air-to-air missile
Claiming it has a long range exceeding 600 km

claimText: The Integrated Air Defence Weapon System (IADWS) incorporates a high-power laser-based Directed Energy Weapon (DEW) developed by CHESS.
evidenceExcerpt: IADWS features a high-power laser-based Directed Energy Weapon (DEW) developed by CHESS.
examUse: Statement-based question on the advanced technological components of India's IADWS.
distractorHooks: Stating that IADWS relies solely on kinetic interceptors and lacks directed energy weapons
Attributing the DEW development to a foreign defense contractor
